quick_reference.title: Sterling Bond
quick_reference.logline: A disgraced operative running a London pawnshop buys an antique watch tied to a cartel account and becomes the next target.

episode_summaries.core_event: Maya buys a coded watch, refuses to sell it back, and discovers the seller dead with a surveillance photo of herself.
episode_summaries.tone: quiet menace with rising surveillance paranoia
episode_summaries.key_reversal: The danger is already pointed at Maya herself.
episode_summaries.closing_hook: Maya chooses the burner card instead of the police.

scene_index.core_event: Piotr sells Maya the pocket watch under visible panic.
scene_index.start_state: Maya controls the room; Piotr enters destabilized.
scene_index.end_state: Maya secures the watch and knows the engraving matters.

scene_index.core_event: Elliot offers to buy the watch back and leaves a warning card.
scene_index.start_state: Maya is curious but unafraid; Elliot arrives already informed.
scene_index.end_state: Maya now knows the buyer knows her identity and expects escalation.

shot_rows.visual_content: Dusty front window light cuts across dense silver shelves; UV lamp glows on Maya's counter; register drawer open.
shot_rows.character_action: Maya stands behind counter sorting rings.
shot_rows.key_info_point: Establish Maya's domain, lighting logic, and prop layout before conflict enters.
shot_rows.shot_language: WIDE | EYE-LEVEL | STATIC | shelves deep background, Maya small at counter
shot_rows.sfx_music: ambient shop room tone, faint street hush
shot_rows.continuity_notes: UV lamp already on; register drawer open; Maya behind counter facing front window.
shot_rows.ai_note: Cold daylight from frame left, dusty diffusion, silver clutter everywhere. Maya in dark cardigan, still posture, minimal motion.

shot_rows.visual_content: Piotr pushes in, glances back through the glass before stepping fully inside.
shot_rows.character_action: Piotr enters, checks street, then approaches counter.
shot_rows.key_info_point: Piotr arrives already afraid of something outside.
shot_rows.shot_language: MEDIUM | EYE-LEVEL | SLIGHT PUSH IN | door frame isolates Piotr
shot_rows.sfx_music: bell ring at door, street hush dips under
shot_rows.continuity_notes: Piotr coat on; Maya remains behind counter; front door swings inward then settles.
shot_rows.ai_note: Piotr half-backlit from exterior, sweat at hairline, oversized coat. Push in subtle, keep Maya blurred behind him.

shot_rows.visual_content: Alone again, Maya photographs the engraving before locking the watch away.
shot_rows.character_action: Maya raises phone, takes the photo, then moves toward safe off-frame.
shot_rows.key_info_point: Maya quietly confirms this object is worth preserving and hiding.
shot_rows.shot_language: MCU | EYE-LEVEL | STATIC | phone and watch foreground, Maya eye above
shot_rows.sfx_music: shutter click isolated, room tone falls away into near-silence
shot_rows.continuity_notes: Phone screen on camera mode; Maya right hand holds watch, left hand phone; safe action begins after cut.
shot_rows.ai_note: Phone glow reflects off silver case. Maya's eye visible, sharp and unreadable. Hold on the shutter click.

shot_rows.visual_content: Laptop open on back counter; velvet pouch beside it; front door opens into otherwise empty shop.
shot_rows.character_action: Maya stands at back counter as Elliot enters frame.
shot_rows.key_info_point: Maya is actively researching the engraving when Elliot arrives.
shot_rows.shot_language: WIDE | EYE-LEVEL | STATIC | laptop and pouch foreground, door rear frame
shot_rows.sfx_music: room tone, faint laptop fan, door bell
shot_rows.continuity_notes: Laptop on, search page open; pouch on Maya's right; Maya at back counter; door opens inward.
shot_rows.ai_note: Cool interior, practical screen glow on Maya, Elliot entering from rear with clean silhouette.

shot_rows.visual_content: Maya turns the business card over; handwritten message reads: Don't call the police.
shot_rows.character_action: Maya flips card with thumb and freezes on the warning.
shot_rows.key_info_point: The buyer knows the situation is criminal and expects escalation tonight.
shot_rows.shot_language: INSERT | TOP-DOWN | STATIC | card centered, handwriting sharp
shot_rows.sfx_music: room tone drops; paper flick, no score
shot_rows.continuity_notes: Burner card now in Maya's right hand; laptop remains open; message side visible at shot end.
shot_rows.ai_note: Tight insert, card centered on dark desk surface, handwriting crisp. Keep Maya's fingers tense at edge of frame.
